title: Besn

{{Quote|The Art group reports on the suitability of art forms within their sector, trying to apply the same austere tenets of the New Order to every art form within the galaxy; sand-casting of Tatooine, transnovels of Cadomai, participlays of Besn, the dynamic holosculptures of Ediorung—all are judged by the same inflexible criteria.|Imperial Intelligence report to a Grand Moff|<ref name="ISB2">[[Imperial Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''Imperial Sourcebook'', Second Edition]]</ref>}}
'''Besn''' was a celestial body<ref name="ISB2" /> located in the [[Besn system/Legends|Besn system]], a part of the [[Mayagil sector/Legends|Mayagil sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="TrailingSectors" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the origin point of the art form known as [[participlay]]s, which the [[Art (COMPNOR)/Legends|Art]] group of the [[Coalition for Progress/Legends|Coalition for Progress]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|Commission for the Preservation of the New Order]] reviewed and judged. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] noted Besn's participlays in a report prepared for an Imperial [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]], which in turn was later added by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Historian/Legends|historian]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]] to a compilation of Imperial documents for Alliance [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] and other Rebel [[Officer/Legends|officers]].<ref name="ISB2" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Taldot-Voyages13.png|thumb|right|250px|''Voyages SF'' 13 placed Besn in the Taldot sector.]]
Besn was first mentioned in [[Greg Gorden]]'s [[1989]] ''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="ISB">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref> "[[Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are]]," a [[1990]] [[roleplaying game]] source article published in the [[Voyages SF 13|thirteenth issue]] of the ''[[Voyages SF]]'' magazine, placed Besn in the [[Taldot sector/Legends|Taldot sector]].<ref name="Twinkle">{{VoyagesCite|13|Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are}}</ref> Since that article was released outside of the [[Lucas Licensing]] process, it is considered non-[[canon]]ical with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="Unlicensed">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Besn [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body, in grid square N-18.<ref name="TEA" />
